system-o://darkloop cd /  ← terminal

darklp

the unattended operating cycle of a conforming vault. the chain, the loops, and the heartbeats maintain the system while you're away - you are time-shifted, never removed.

not a dark factory. nothing ships without you; evidence waits at dawn. silence is a detectable failure, never an acceptable state.

23:12
day 000 · MON
CUSTODY OPERATOR
SIM

Not a dark factory

$ diff dark_factory darkloop
-lights-out production: agents plan, write, review, ship - no human touches the loop.
-the operator is removed. silence means it's working - you hope.
+lights-out maintenance: the chain runs while you sleep; every revolution terminates in evidence.
+the operator is time-shifted, never removed - you re-enter at dawn by reading, not by trusting.
+silence is a detectable failure - a missing heartbeat is itself a finding.

Three properties

CLOSED OVER THE VAULT

reads vault state, writes vault state - within declared scopes, through declared gates. no side channel is load-bearing.

TIME-SHIFTED, NOT REMOVED

every revolution ends in surfacing: report + review queue. unreviewed LLM output waits for you unless an endpoint has earned auto-apply.

SILENCE IS DETECTABLE

heartbeats make "didn't run" distinguishable from "ran clean." a missing heartbeat is itself a surfaced finding.

Four rings

#RingCadenceOne revolution
0CELLsec-min · per findingdetect → propose → verify → apply. the atomic unit; the only ring that touches an LLM.
1DAY ⁄ SPLIT~24 hdark arc: the chain - gates, loop runners, heartbeats, report build. light arc: your session - resume, work, wrap tail. same timescale, alternating custody.
2SYNTHESISweeklyrolls ~7 day revolutions into a strategic review. note the thin band - a week is only ×7 a day; the log scale doesn't lie.
3RETENTIONdays → qtr/yrsweep, purge, archive - the slowest state machines. forgetting, on a schedule.

Two crossings

DAWN

dark → light · 06:12

the surfacing bundle: built report, review queue, heartbeat summary. you re-enter by reading evidence, not by trusting silence.

DUSK

light → dark · 23:40

the wrap tail: handoff + session log + dashboard bump. the chain audits this crossing - an incomplete wrap is a finding, not a mystery.

spec §darkloop · custody alternates only at crossings · every crossing is a vault artifact
darkloop is a system-o term of art · coined july 2026

← back to the terminal
